# Straight Line Analysis

**Summary**: A method used to identify flow regimes (bilinear, linear, and BDF) from production data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-aleid|Aleid, 2018]] applied straight-line analysis to determine fracture parameters like SRV permeability and volume.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified three flow regimes: bilinear flow, linear flow, and a transition toward BDF. ([[2018-aleid|Aleid, 2018, p. 82]])
